symptom_description: Water sight level glass on moisture separator bowl completely full of liquid. Electronic drain solenoid clicking but no water discharging.
root_cause: Accumulation of rust scales, pipe dope, and oily emulsion sludge clogged inlet strainer of electronic zero-loss drain valve.
action_taken: Isolated and bypassed drain line, disassembled electronic zero-loss drain valve, cleaned strainer mesh of rust sludge, and rebuilt solenoid valve.
parts_used: 24V Drain Solenoid Coil, Diaphragm Repair Kit, Bowl O-Ring

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`moderate`) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced burned-out 24V solenoid coil and internal diaphragm repair kit on automatic condensate drain assembly; tested manual blowdown.
parts_used: Electronic Zero-Loss Drain Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit, Drain Strainer Mesh

symptom_description: Loud high humming and `104` Amps locked rotor current when compressor attempts to start. Main breaker trips after 3 seconds.
root_cause: Internal discharge valve reed fracture inside hermetic shell causing complete loss of pumping capacity.
action_taken: Recovered refrigerant, cut out mechanically seized hermetic compressor, brazed in exact replacement compressor and filter drier, evacuated, and weighed in fresh R-134a charge.
parts_used: Hard Start Capacitor Kit, Compressor Contactor 24V

symptom_description: Compressor short cycling on low-pressure cutout switch. Tech observed intermittent oil residue on copper brazed joint near evaporator.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole developed inside air-to-refrigerant heat exchanger due to acidic condensate accumulation.
action_taken: Repaired pinhole braze leak at evaporator inlet header, installed new bi-flow filter drier, and charged unit with precise weight of R-134a.
parts_used: Filter Drier Core Assembly, Braze Alloy, R-134a Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`minor`) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Degradation of drain valve internal diaphragm/seal preventing pilot opening during timed drain discharge cycles.
action_taken: Isolated and bypassed drain line, disassembled electronic zero-loss drain valve, cleaned strainer mesh of rust sludge, and rebuilt solenoid valve.
parts_used: Electronic Zero-Loss Drain Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit, Drain Strainer Mesh

symptom_description: Water sight level glass on moisture separator bowl completely full of liquid. Electronic drain solenoid clicking but no water discharging.
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced jammed internal float assembly with upgraded heavy-duty electronic zero-loss condensate drain trap and flushed separator bowl.
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: Compressor short cycling on low-pressure cutout switch. Tech observed severe oil residue on copper brazed joint near evaporator.
root_cause: Vibration fatigue cracked copper capillary tube at brazed connection to hot gas bypass valve manifold.
action_taken: Replaced leaking Schrader valve cores and service caps, pulled deep vacuum to verify holding, and recharged refrigerant to nameplate specification.
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Caps, R-134a Refrigerant (4 lbs), Filter Drier Element

symptom_description: Liquid water blowing down downstream compressed air lines (`minor` moisture in plant header). Dryer automatic drain valve silent.
root_cause: Degradation of drain valve internal diaphragm/seal preventing pilot opening during timed drain discharge cycles.
action_taken: Disassembled and cleaned moisture separator sump, installed new drain solenoid valve rebuild kit, and verified timed discharge cycles.
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: Loud distinct humming and `81` Amps locked rotor current when compressor attempts to start. Main breaker trips after 3 seconds.
root_cause: Single-phasing or severe voltage dip on incoming feed damaged hermetic compressor start winding.
action_taken: Recovered refrigerant, cut out mechanically seized hermetic compressor, brazed in exact replacement compressor and filter drier, evacuated, and weighed in fresh R-134a charge.
parts_used: Compressor Run Capacitor 45uF, Start Relay Kit, Contactor

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`minor`) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Solenoid coil burnout on automatic condensate drain valve (`open circuit` measured across coil terminals).
action_taken: Replaced burned-out 24V solenoid coil and internal diaphragm repair kit on automatic condensate drain assembly; tested manual blowdown.
parts_used: 24V Drain Solenoid Coil, Diaphragm Repair Kit, Bowl O-Ring

symptom_description: Water sight level glass on moisture separator bowl completely full of liquid. Electronic drain solenoid clicking but no water discharging.
root_cause: Accumulation of rust scales, pipe dope, and oily emulsion sludge clogged inlet strainer of electronic zero-loss drain valve.
action_taken: Isolated and bypassed drain line, disassembled electronic zero-loss drain valve, cleaned strainer mesh of rust sludge, and rebuilt solenoid valve.
parts_used: Automatic Drain Rebuild Kit, Separator Bowl Gasket

symptom_description: Air dryer dew point gauge reading `108`°C (high dew point alarm active). Suction pressure on refrigerant compressor reading near `0` PSI.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole developed inside air-to-refrigerant heat exchanger due to acidic condensate accumulation.
action_taken: Located leak using electronic leak detector, repaired rubbed copper tubing section, replaced liquid line filter drier, evacuated system, and recharged with R-407C.
parts_used: R-407C Refrigerant Charge (8 lbs), Hermetic Filter Drier, Copper Tubing Section

symptom_description: Compressor short cycling on low-pressure cutout switch. Tech observed abnormal oil residue on copper brazed joint near evaporator.
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge over past 6 months.
action_taken: Recovered remaining refrigerant charge, repaired cracked capillary tube brazed joint with 15% silver solder, evacuated to 500 microns, and weighed in factory charge of R-134a.
parts_used: R-407C Refrigerant Charge (8 lbs), Hermetic Filter Drier, Copper Tubing Section

symptom_description: Hermetic compressor making severe distinct internal clattering clicking. Suction and discharge pressures equalized while running.
root_cause: Electrical burnout of compressor start/run capacitor (`capacitance measured 0 uF vs 45 uF rating`) preventing motor start.
action_taken: Replaced failed compressor start kit (capacitor + relay), checked contactor tips, and verified smooth compressor running draw (`6.5 Amps`).
parts_used: Hermetic Scroll Compressor Unit, Liquid Line Drier, R-407C Refrigerant (8 lbs)

symptom_description: Compressed air exiting dryer feels humid (`severe` moisture present). Refrigerant sight glass shows bubbles and low charge indicator.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole developed inside air-to-refrigerant heat exchanger due to acidic condensate accumulation.
action_taken: Replaced leaking Schrader valve cores and service caps, pulled deep vacuum to verify holding, and recharged refrigerant to nameplate specification.
parts_used: Filter Drier Core Assembly, Braze Alloy, R-134a Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Compressed air exiting dryer feels humid (`concerning` moisture present). Refrigerant sight glass shows bubbles and low charge indicator.
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge over past 6 months.
action_taken: Located leak using electronic leak detector, repaired rubbed copper tubing section, replaced liquid line filter drier, evacuated system, and recharged with R-407C.
